input: Perform Cox proportional hazards regression for OS in NSCLC. Covariates: age, stage (III vs IV), ECOG, smoking status, EGFR mutation. Provide HR with 95% CI.
Calculate sample size for a superiority RCT. Control event rate 30%, expected reduction to 20% with treatment. Alpha=0.05, power=80%, 1:1 randomization.
Compare PFS between two treatment arms using Kaplan-Meier analysis. Provide median PFS, log-rank test, and KM curves.
Build a logistic regression model predicting treatment response (binary) from PD-L1 TPS, TMB, and age. Report OR, AUC, calibration.
Pool odds ratios from 8 studies using random-effects meta-analysis. Assess heterogeneity (I², Q-test). Check publication bias (funnel plot, Egger's).
A GWAS tests 1 million SNPs. 50 SNPs have p < 5e-5. How many survive genome-wide significance? Apply Bonferroni and FDR corrections.
Design a Bayesian adaptive Phase 2 trial. Prior: Beta(1,1). Success threshold: P(response rate > 20%) > 0.90. Interim at N=20, final at N=40.
Fit a linear mixed-effects model for longitudinal HbA1c measurements. Fixed: treatment group, time, treatment×time. Random: patient intercept and slope.
A study with N=30 per arm reported p=0.08 for a treatment difference of 5 points (SD=15). Calculate the post-hoc power. Was this study adequately powered?
Perform competing risks analysis for cardiovascular death vs non-cardiovascular death in a heart failure cohort. Use Fine-Gray subdistribution hazard model.
